context.projectOverview: Sprint 21 — bober rollback CLI + planRollback/executeRollback. Each inverse goes through Sprint 20 risky-action gate (per-step approval, not plan-level). Writes outcome to rollback-execution.jsonl.

completedSprints.title: Incident timeline
completedSprints.summary: appendChange writes to changelog.jsonl; ChangeEntry has REQUIRED inverse + status enum (pending|executed|rolled-back|failed). Status updates need an extension pattern.

completedSprints.title: Deployer + gates
completedSprints.summary: executeAction enforces risky-action gate; resolveRiskyActionMechanismName forced floor; ExecutorSeam pattern. Sprint 21 uses these same gates.

completedSprints.title: Disk-marker + bober approve CLI
completedSprints.summary: CLI commands at src/cli/commands/. Pattern for adding new subcommand.
